title: Create: Crystal Clear
description: {FABRIC AND FORGE} A mod that adds glass casings to create
body:
# Create: Crystal Clear
**Create: Crystal Clear is a mod that adds glass casings to create, along with adding a few other glass related things in the near future.**

[Curse Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-crystal-clear)

## Installation Requirements
**Versions below 2.0 BETA requires forge, 1.18.2 or 1.19.2**

**2.0 BETA requires Fabric OR forge, 1.20.1**

Additionally, if you're having trouble with faces disappearing with rubidium installed, 

Go to Video setting > performance And turn off Use Block Face culling
